languages.original_text: "It is my creed. The incontrovertible fact that has defined my existence for as long as I can recall, and I recall a great deal. I have devoted myself to the mysteries of flesh and metal, to the processes by which one joins with the other, by which they live in union and how they die. I am intimately familiar with machines such as the one that I restored to life — I will school the members of the priesthood on board in its litanies of maintenance and operation, and reveal the secrets of the command runes so they may operate it themselves."

languages.text: "Это мое кредо. Неопровержимый факт, что определял мое бытие сколько я себя помню, а помню я весьма многое. Я посвятил себя таинствам плоти и металла, тому, как одно единяется с другим, как они живут в содружестве и погибают. Машины, подобные той, что я вернул к жизни, хорошо знакомы мне — я обучу ваших техножрецов литаниям обслуживания и эксплуатации и открою секреты командных рун, чтобы они могли оперировать ей сами".

"It is my creed. The incontrovertible fact that has defined my existence for as long as I can recall, and I recall a great deal. I have devoted myself to the mysteries of flesh and metal, to the processes by which one joins with the other, by which they live in union and how they die. I am intimately familiar with machines such as the one that I restored to life — I will school the members of the priesthood on board in its litanies of maintenance and operation, and reveal the secrets of the command runes so they may operate it themselves."

Машины, подобные той, что я вернул к жизни, хорошо знакомы мне — я обучу ваших техножрецов литаниям обслуживания и эксплуатации и открою секреты командных рун, чтобы они могли оперировать ей сами".

I have devoted myself to the mysteries of flesh and metal, to the processes by which one joins with the other, by which they live in union and how they die. I am intimately familiar with machines such as the one that I restored to life — I will school the members of the priesthood on board in its litanies of maintenance and operation, and reveal the secrets of the command runes so they may operate it themselves."

languages.text: 「それは私の信条です。私が記憶している限り、私の存在を定義してきた、揺るぎない事実です。私は肉体と金属の謎に、そしてそれらがどのように結合し、どのように共存し、どのように死に至るのかを研究してきました。この機械を蘇らせたように、私は技術者仲間たちにその維持と操作の呪文を教え、彼らが自ら操縦できるように、コマンド・ルーンの秘密を解き明かします」
languages.original_text: "It is my creed. The incontrovertible fact that has defined my existence for as long as I can recall, and I recall a great deal. I have devoted myself to the mysteries of flesh and metal, to the processes by which one joins with the other, by which they live in fellowship and die. I am intimately familiar with machines such as the one that I restored to life — I will school the tech-comrades on board in its litanies of maintenance and operation, and unlock the secrets of the command runes so that they may operate it themselves."

languages.text: "Das ist mein Glaube Die unumstößliche Tatsache, die meine Existenz definiert, seit ich mich erinnern kann, und ich erinnere mich an Vieles. Ich habe mich den Mysterien von Fleisch und Metall verschrieben, den Prozessen, durch die das Eine mit dem Anderen verschmilzt, durch die sie als Einheit leben und sterben. Ich bin bestens mit Maschinen wie der, die ich ins Leben zurückgeholt habe, vertraut ... ich werde die Mitglieder der Priesterschaft an Bord hinsichtlich ihrer Litaneien der Wartung und Bedienung unterweisen und ihnen die Geheimnisse der Kommandorunen offenbaren, auf dass sie sie selbst bedienen können."
languages.original_text: "It is my creed. The incontrovertible fact that has defined my existence for as long as I can recall, and I recall a great deal. I have devoted myself to the mysteries of flesh and metal, to the processes by which one joins with the other, by which they live in union and how they die. I am intimately familiar with machines such as the one that I restored to life — I will school the members of the priesthood on board in its litanies of maintenance and operation, and reveal the secrets of the command runes so they may operate it themselves."

Ich habe mich den Mysterien von Fleisch und Metall verschrieben, den Prozessen, durch die das Eine mit dem Anderen verschmilzt, durch die sie als Einheit leben und sterben. Ich bin bestens mit Maschinen wie der, die ich ins Leben zurückgeholt habe, vertraut ... ich werde die Mitglieder der Priesterschaft an Bord hinsichtlich ihrer Litaneien der Wartung und Bedienung unterweisen und ihnen die Geheimnisse der Kommandorunen offenbaren, auf dass sie sie selbst bedienen können."

languages.text: «En eso consiste mi credo. Una realidad incontestable que ha definido mi existencia desde que tengo uso de memoria, y le aseguro que mi memoria es longeva. He consagrado mi vida a los misterios de la carne y el metal, a los procesos mediante los cuales se combinan, viven unidos y mueren en armonía. Estoy familiarizado con las máquinas como esa a la que he insuflado vida; enseñaré a los miembros del sacerdocio de a bordo las letanías de mantenimiento y funcionamiento, y revelaré los secretos de las runas de mando para que ellos también puedan operarlas».
languages.original_text: "It is my creed. The incontrovertible fact that has defined my existence for as long as I can recall, and I recall a great deal. I have devoted myself to the mysteries of flesh and metal, to the processes by which one joins with the other, by which they live in union and how they die. I am intimately familiar with machines such as the one that I restored to life — I will school the members of the priesthood on board in its litanies of maintenance and operation, and reveal the secrets of the command runes so they may operate it themselves."

Estoy familiarizado con las máquinas como esa a la que he insuflado vida; enseñaré a los miembros del sacerdocio de a bordo las letanías de mantenimiento y funcionamiento, y revelaré los secretos de las runas de mando para que ellos también puedan operarlas».

languages.text: "Bu benim inancım. Hatırlayabildiğim kadar uzun süredir varlığımı tanımlayan tartışılmaz gerçek ki çok şeyi hatırlarım. Kendimi et ve metalin gizemlerine; birinin diğeriyle birleştiği, birlikte yaşadıkları ve öldükleri süreçlere adadım. Hayata döndürdüğüm makine gibi makinelere yakından aşinayım. Gemideki rahiplik mensuplarını bakım ve işletim ilahileri konusunda eğiteceğim ve komuta rünlerinin sırlarını açığa çıkaracağım ki kendileri de işletebilsinler."
languages.original_text: "It is my creed. The incontrovertible fact that has defined my existence for as long as I can recall, and I recall a great deal. I have devoted myself to the mysteries of flesh and metal, to the processes by which one joins with the other, by which they live in union and how they die. I am intimately familiar with machines such as the one that I restored to life — I will school the members of the priesthood on board in its litanies of maintenance and operation, and reveal the secrets of the command runes so they may operate it themselves."

traits.locale_text: "Bu benim inancım. Hatırlayabildiğim kadar uzun süredir varlığımı tanımlayan tartışılmaz gerçek ki çok şeyi hatırlarım. Kendimi et ve metalin gizemlerine; birinin diğeriyle birleştiği, birlikte yaşadıkları ve öldükleri süreçlere adadım. Hayata döndürdüğüm makine gibi makinelere yakından aşinayım. Gemideki rahiplik mensuplarını bakım ve işletim ilahileri konusunda eğiteceğim ve komuta rünlerinin sırlarını açığa çıkaracağım ki kendileri de işletebilsinler."

languages.text: « Il s'agit de mon dogme. Le fait incontestable qui régit mon existence depuis aussi longtemps que je m'en souvienne, et j'ai une très bonne mémoire. Je me suis consacré aux mystères de la chair et du métal, et aux processus par lesquels ils s'unissent, vivent en communion, puis meurent. Je connais intimement les machines comme celle que j'ai ramenée à la vie. Je formerai les membres du clergé à ses litanies d'entretien et de fonctionnement, et leur dévoilerai les secrets des runes de contrôle pour qu'ils puissent eux-mêmes la faire fonctionner. »
languages.original_text: "It is my creed. The incontrovertible fact that has defined my existence for as long as I can recall, and I recall a great deal. I have devoted myself to the mysteries of flesh and metal, to the processes by which one joins with the other, by which they live in union and how they die. I am intimately familiar with machines such as the one that I restored to life — I will school the members of the priesthood on board in its litanies of maintenance and operation, and reveal the secrets of the command runes so they may operate it themselves."

languages.text: “这是我的信条。自我有记忆以来——而我所记浩瀚如海——这个不容置疑的事实就定义了我的存在。我致力于探索血肉与金属的无解之谜，探究二者结合、共存与消亡的进程。我对我所修复的此类机械了如指掌。我将向舰上的祭司们传授维护与操作的祷文，并揭示命令符文的奥秘，使他们能自行操作。”
